edition.dagbeeld: Het US-Iran conflict domineert de ochtendeditie: een negende nacht van Amerikaanse luchtaanvallen en Iraanse vergeldingen — inclusief claims over aanvallen op Amerikaanse vliegtuigen boven Jordanië en dreigementen om de Straat van Hormuz te blokkeren. Tegelijk escaleert de spanning in Oekraïne na een van de zwaarste Russische raketaanvallen van de oorlog. De wereld houdt de adem in terwijl olieprijs en veiligheidsspanningen stijgen.

article.title: US launches ninth night of strikes on Iran as it hits out at Gulf neighbors
article.summary: Early on Monday, Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they had launched a 'surprise attack' on an 'enemy command center' in Syria. This fresh round of violence comes after three new US military fatalities were announced, as hope for a political settlement to end the war has dimmed.

opening.note: Negende nacht van Amerikaanse strikes op Iran; Iran claimt aanval op VS-vliegtuigen boven Jordanië.
opening.label: breaking

article.title: Increased Cooperation With U.S. Has Put Jordan in Iran’s Cross Hairs
article.summary: Jordan’s role in U.S. operations against Iran has grown as other allies in the region have restricted Washington’s ability to use their bases and airspace.

front.note: Jordanië speelt steeds grotere rol in VS-operaties nu andere regionale bondgenoten terugtrekken.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Oil Prices Cross $90 a Barrel as U.S.-Iran Conflict Widens
article.summary: Brent crude, the global benchmark for oil, rose more than 3 percent as trading resumed on Sunday, while S&P 500 futures remained essentially unchanged.

front.note: Olieprijs schiet door $90 per vat door toenemende vrees voor afsluiting Hormuzstraat.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Russia Batters Kyiv in One of the Largest Missile Assaults of the War
article.summary: On Saturday, Ukraine hit two warehouses in Russia in strikes that killed at least eight people and injured 62.

front.note: Rusland treft Kyiv in een van de zwaarste raketaanvallen van de oorlog.

article.title: Federal Agents Were Told FBI Will No Longer Investigate ICE Confrontations

items.summary: In the Middle East, the deterioration of the US-Iran ceasefire has reignited fears of a prolonged regional war. In Europe, Moscow launched one of its largest ballistic missile attacks against Ukraine while Kyiv ramped up its bombing campaign.

items.title: In a Paris café, terror attack survivors find community: 'People want to tell each other: I am alive'
items.summary: After long days attending the trial concerning the Paris attacks of November 13, 2015, survivors and relatives of victims would meet in a bar to comfort one other. They have continued to gather every month, joined by victims of other attacks, to share experiences, advice and, above all, laughter and good company.
